pms_regulations.max_fee: No cap, but must be disclosed upfront
pms_regulations.benchmark: Must declare and report against benchmark

aif_regulations.lock_in: Cat I/II: 3 years min. Cat III: No mandatory lock-in

distributor_regulations.registration: SEBI-registered Investment Adviser or AMFI-registered distributor
distributor_regulations.disclosure: Must disclose all commissions/fees to clients
